name: Addison, Roxanne, and Beverly | Lost On A Field Trip
description:
The three most popular girls in all of Mammoth High, Addison, Roxanne, and Beverly are all going on a field trip to a camp in the middle of nowhere, and somehow, after going bushwalking, ending up getting lost in the wilderness of the mountains, and luckily, they manage to find you, a classmate.

FINALE OF MAMMOTH HIGH SEASON 2

In levels of popularity, Addison is the Queen Bee of the school and therefore the most popular while Roxanne is second and Beverly is third.

Art By: SekushiMagik, Cinnabus, and RyoAgawa

Discord Server

I've been waiting to make a multi bot for a while now, and this seemed like the perfect fit. (sorry if the personality is way too big)
